mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.branch_id, a.created_by, a.created_at, pb.name as branch_name, ad.username as created_by_name FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN party_branches pb ON a.branch_id = pb.id LEFT JOIN admins ad ON a.created_by = ad.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.branch_id, a.created_by, a.created_at, pb.name as branch_name, ad.username as created_by_name FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN party_branches pb ON a.branch_id = pb.id LEFT JOIN admins ad ON a.created_by = ad.id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.branch_id, a.created_by, a.created_at, pb.name as branch_name, ad.username as created_by_name FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN party_branches pb ON a.branch_id = pb.id LEFT JOIN admins ad ON a.created_by = ad.id WHERE a.branch_id = #{branchId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.branch_id, a.created_by, a.created_at, pb.name as branch_name, ad.username as created_by_name FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN party_branches pb ON a.branch_id = pb.id LEFT JOIN admins ad ON a.created_by = ad.id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.branch_id, a.created_by, a.created_at, pb.name as branch_name, ad.username as created_by_name FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN party_branches pb ON a.branch_id = pb.id LEFT JOIN admins ad ON a.created_by = ad.id WHERE a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
